source: 《学会写作2.0》(粥左罗著) 原创知识图谱视觉DNA提取

color_palette.description: 蓝橙紫三色体系: 主蓝#31ACF4(标题/强调), 橙红#FA9960(对比/CTA), 紫#A088FF(辅助信息), 白底大量留白

typography.description: OPPOSans(主) + HarmonyOS Sans(辅), 6级字号层次

layout.badges: numbered circular badges (01-08), top-left of each card
layout.description: 便当格变体: 模块分区 + 内部3层层级展开(大模块→子主题→细节项)

visual_frequency.HF: 模块标题 + 编号徽章 + 主色强调元素 (前1/3画面密集)
visual_frequency.MF: 子主题 + 正文内容 + 中性色支撑 (中段叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 细节项 + 标注 + 浅色背景 (底部收束)
visual_frequency.progression: HF密集分布前1/3画面抓眼球, MF中段叙事, LF底部收束氛围

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 内容创作者·知识工作者·渴望系统化方法论
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 进阶方法论可视化, 需读者有内容创作基础, 术语可占40%

reader_constraint.reader_state: 学习者·渴望系统掌握写作方法论
reader_constraint.reader_mode: 研读模式(深度学习+笔记)
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 8大模块完整体系 + 每模块3-5个要点 + 可操作步骤

prompt_keywords: flat infographic design, rounded rectangle cards, clean three-color system, blue orange purple, white background, sans-serif typography, 3-layer hierarchy, professional knowledge map, no 3D no shadows no gradients, crisp vector, text-embedded cards, numbered badges
negative_keywords: 3D render, shadows, gradients, photorealistic, complex textures, dark background, cluttered, handwritten, sketch, watercolor
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 学会写作2.0信息图
✅ 必须: 扁平化设计 + 圆角矩形卡片 + 蓝橙紫三色 + 白底留白 + 无3D无阴影无渐变 + 文字嵌入卡片 + 编号徽章
❌ 禁止: 3D渲染 + 阴影 + 渐变 + 写实照片 + 复杂纹理 + 暗色背景
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Flat infographic design ONLY. Rounded rectangle cards with blue #31ACF4 / orange #FA9960 / purple #A088FF three-color system on white background. NO 3D, NO shadows, NO gradients. Text must be embedded inside cards. Use numbered circular badges.
meta_prompt: flat infographic, rounded rectangle cards, blue #31ACF4 primary, orange #FA9960 accent, purple #A088FF auxiliary, white background, OPPOSans typography, 3-layer hierarchy, numbered badges, professional knowledge map, crisp vector, no 3D no shadows no gradients
prompt_example: Hook section, flat infographic design, rounded rectangle cards, blue #31ACF4 primary color for title, orange #FA9960 accent for highlights, purple #A088FF for secondary info, white background with light blue #E8F0FC card fills, OPPOSans typography (title 24pt bold, body 12pt regular), 3-layer hierarchy, numbered circular badge 01, generous whitespace, no 3D no shadows no gradients, crisp vector aesthetic, text embedded inside shapes. --ar 3:4 --s 250 --style raw
reference_source: 《学会写作2.0》(粥左罗著) 原创知识图谱(终稿) - 制图:凯歌设计笔记 - 制图软件:亿图图示
